pi_items.source: Web search and openstreetmap Nominatim check for bounding box of Tasmania.
Schema analysis of field_observations table in world_survey.gpkg (lacks name and description columns).
Path definitions in setup_task.sh and Android setup scripts.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on real-world geographic coordinates and iNaturalist observation data inside world_survey.gpkg. The target bounding box correctly encapsulates the main island of Tasmania (-44.0 to -40.0 lat, 144.0 to 149.0 lon). The expected GeoPackage path is valid and corresponds to the environment configuration. However, there is a fundamental schema mismatch: the task asks the user to set a feature name to "Tasmania Depot", but the field_observations table lacks "name" and "description" columns (containing only fid, geom, observer_name, species, location, obs_date, and quality_grade). This missing schema renders the attribute impossible to legitimately set and causes the export_result.sh script to generate malformed JSON, thus permanently crashing the verifier.
